title: tf.nn.embedding_lookup_sparse  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Looks up embeddings for the given ids and weights from a list of tensors.
paramsis a dense tensor or a list of dense tensors, andsp_idsis a 2Dtf.SparseTensorortf.RaggedTensorindicating the indices ofparamsto
gather.
This op is best described with an example. Supposeparamsis an embedding
table of size(4, 2)andsp_idshas 3 rows. Sincesp_idsis sparse or
ragged, not every row has the same number of elements. The output has shape
(3, 2). Each row ofsp_idsis a list of indices, where each index selects a
row ofparams. For a given row ofsp_ids, the rows ofparamsare
gathered based on the indices insp_ids, then combined by taking their sum
or mean.
